User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Rebuy Tracker application, typically a dealer.

uid.description: The Firebase Authentication unique user ID.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a player in the poker game.

name.description: The player's chosen name for the game.

rebuys.description: The number of re-buys the player has made, including the initial buy-in.

blackCoins.description: The number of black coins the player has at the end of the game.
